Hero.subtitle: Explore exclusive units with live prices, clear layouts, and flexible payment plans with expert support.

Problem.lead: Finding a home inside a compound takes time, effort, and endless phone calls — with prices that change without notice.
Problem.checklistTitle: Our app brings everything together in one place
Problem.item3: direct access to experts and developers

Choosing.f1Body: No outdated listings or unexpected changes.
Choosing.f2Body: Get professional guidance for living or investment.
Choosing.f3Body: Compare installments, down payments, and duration easily.
Choosing.f4Body: See exact unit details before making any move.

HowItWorks.heading: How It Works
HowItWorks.step1: Download the app and create your account in minutes.
HowItWorks.step2: Browse compounds, explore available units, and compare prices and layouts.
HowItWorks.step3: Choose your payment plan or contact an expert or developer directly.
HowItWorks.step1Alt: Download the app from the App Store
HowItWorks.step3Alt: Book a session or choose a plan

TrustedDevelopers.heading: Trusted developers
TrustedDevelopers.body: We work with leading real estate developers to bring you verified projects, accurate unit details, and transparent pricing.
TrustedDevelopers.cta: Explore developer projects inside the app.

Professionalism.heading: We believe trust is built on professionalism.
Professionalism.intro: Every department in our team is designed to provide you with expert support at every step of your journey towards owning the perfect property.
Professionalism.salesBody: Our experts are your direct bridge to the best opportunities. They help you understand the market, provide smart investment recommendations, and accompany you until the deal is finalized to ensure maximum return.
Professionalism.financialBody: We guarantee you complete transparency in all financial matters. This team is dedicated to designing flexible and clear payment systems and managing all financial details with precision for a secure and smooth transaction.
Professionalism.legalBody: We prioritize your legal safety. Our legal team verifies all property documentation and reviews contracts to ensure every transaction is completed within a sound and secure legal framework, giving you total peace of mind.

DownloadCTA.heading: finding proper property is much simpler
DownloadCTA.sub: See for yourself, try Adham's App for free.

Metadata.homeDescription: Browse exclusive real-estate units in Egypt's top compounds with live prices, transparent layouts, flexible payment plans, and free expert consultation. Download the Adham Fathallah app today.
